name: claude-project-tracker
description: Raul's Claude Code plugin collection — project management, code review agents, and more

plugins.name: project-tracker
plugins.description: Local project management with YAML indexes, per-project tracking files, learning mode, and optional Todoist integration

plugins.name: code-review-agents
plugins.description: Per-language code review agents with tiered severity findings and actionable suggestions. Supports C++ with more languages planned.
